cmd:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json,os,urllib.request
KEY=os.environ.get("N8N_API_KEY","")
BASE="https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1"
for wid,tag in [("4taPP7xaRXZVKQc5","ЧЕРНЕТКА 4taPP7"),("Iz77H1Al7RoHAbNp","ФІНАЛ Iz77H1")]:
    try:
        r=urllib.request.Request(BASE+"/workflows/"+wid,headers={"X-N8N-API-KEY":KEY})
        d=json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(r,timeout=30).read().decode("utf-8","ignore"))
    except Exception as e:
        print(tag,"ERR",str(e)[:60]); continue
    dis=[n.get("name") for n in d.get("nodes",[]) if n.get("disabled")]
    print(tag,"| деактивовані:", dis if dis else "немає")
PY
